message:
fix(wezterm): forward Cx through UnifiedClient impl (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Applies the same Cx-forward fix from tick 30 (Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>)
to `impl WeztermInterface for UnifiedClient`. UnifiedClient explicitly
overrides every non-cx method to forward through `self.inner` — but
relied on the trait defaults for `_with_cx` variants, which would
lose cx at the UnifiedClient hop.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+113 src)

   Adds 11 explicit `_with_cx` overrides on
   `impl WeztermInterface for UnifiedClient`. Each forwards
   `cx` through `self.inner._with_cx(cx, ...)` so the underlying
   WeztermHandle (which forwards correctly per tick 30) reaches
   the concrete WeztermClient override.

   The new overrides mirror the tick 30 Arc<dyn> pattern:
   list_panes_with_cx, get_pane_with_cx, get_text_with_cx,
   send_text_with_cx, send_text_no_paste_with_cx,
   send_text_with_options_with_cx, send_control_with_cx,
   send_ctrl_c_with_cx, send_ctrl_d_with_cx,
   get_pane_direction_with_cx, pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx.

Impact: UnifiedClient is the top-level `WeztermInterface` returned
by `build_unified_client` and used throughout the ft binary (via
runtime's wezterm handle). Without this fix, every entry point
that calls `unified_client.list_panes_with_cx(cx)` would lose
cx at the UnifiedClient → inner hop. With this fix, the full
delegation chain is cx-aware:

  UnifiedClient::list_panes_with_cx
    → inner (Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>).list_panes_with_cx
    → Arc as_ref().list_panes_with_cx (tick 30 fix)
    → WeztermClient::list_panes_with_cx (tick 19)
    → MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx (pre-existing)
    → DirectMuxClient::list_panes_with_cx (pre-existing)

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. The WeztermInterface trait-
object delegation chain is now Cx-first end-to-end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5286,6 +5286,123 @@ impl WeztermInterface for UnifiedClient {
     ) -> WeztermFuture<'_, PaneTieredScrollbackSummary> {
         self.inner.pane_tiered_scrollback_summary(pane_id)
     }
+
+    // --- ft-xbnl0.2.3: Cx-first overrides for UnifiedClient ---
+    //
+    // Same rationale as the Arc<dyn WeztermInterface> overrides in
+    // tick 30. Without explicit _with_cx overrides here, calls would
+    // fall through to the trait default which calls non-cx via
+    // `self.list_panes()` etc. — losing cx at the UnifiedClient hop.
+    // Forward cx through `self.inner._with_cx(cx, ...)` so the
+    // underlying Arc<dyn WeztermInterface> (which now also forwards
+    // correctly per tick 30) reaches the concrete WeztermClient
+    // Cx-first override.
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn list_panes_with_cx<'a>(&'a self, cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx) -> WeztermFuture<'a, Vec<PaneInfo>> {
+        self.inner.list_panes_with_cx(cx)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn get_pane_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, PaneInfo> {
+        self.inner.get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn get_text_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        escapes: bool,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, String> {
+        self.inner.get_text_with_cx(cx, pane_id, escapes)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_text_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        text: &str,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner.send_text_with_cx(cx, pane_id, text)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_text_no_paste_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        text: &str,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner.send_text_no_paste_with_cx(cx, pane_id, text)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_text_with_options_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        text: &str,
+        no_paste: bool,
+        no_newline: bool,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner
+            .send_text_with_options_with_cx(cx, pane_id, text, no_paste, no_newline)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_control_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        control_char: &str,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner.send_control_with_cx(cx, pane_id, control_char)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_ctrl_c_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner.send_ctrl_c_with_cx(cx, pane_id)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn send_ctrl_d_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, ()> {
+        self.inner.send_ctrl_d_with_cx(cx, pane_id)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn get_pane_direction_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+        direction: MoveDirection,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, Option<u64>> {
+        self.inner
+            .get_pane_direction_with_cx(cx, pane_id, direction)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    fn pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx<'a>(
+        &'a self,
+        cx: &'a crate::cx::Cx,
+        pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> WeztermFuture<'a, PaneTieredScrollbackSummary> {
+        self.inner
+            .pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx(cx, pane_id)
+    }
 }
 
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
